name: recall_screenshot_ocr_session_timeout_maps_ac11
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file: a GUI screenshot (.png) of a Windows Group Policy / screensaver lock dialog, run through OCR. Session lock after inactivity is AC-11 (Session Lock). Modeled as a TEXT-kind evidence row holding the OCR transcript (the screenshot itself is image; OCR text is what the tagger sees). The OCR text is short, label-fragmented ('Screen saver', 'Wait: 15 minutes', 'On resume, display logon screen'), carries OCR noise, names NO control ID / CCI / doc number, and has near-zero overlap with 'session lock'. Also too few distinct tokens to clear the Tier-5 body-token floor. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor AC-7 present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The information system prevents further access to the system by initiating a session lock after a defined time period of inactivity.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Configure an inactivity timeout that locks the session.

objectives.text: The information system enforces a limit of consecutive invalid logon attempts.

evidence.title: Screensaver lock GPO screenshot (OCR)
evidence.text:
Screen Saver Settings
Screen saver
(None)  Ribbons  v
Wait: 15 minutes
On resume, display logon screen
Power management
Apply  OK  Cancel
